---
title: "Gallery"
toc: false
---

<style>
.gallery-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.gallery-card {
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
}

.gallery-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
}

.gallery-preview {
  padding: 1rem;
  pointer-events: none;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.gallery-card-label {
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02);
}

.gallery-card-label a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}

/* stretch the link to cover the whole card */
.gallery-card-label a::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
}
</style>

::: gallery-grid

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-label-banner .tl-compact}
::: {.event data-label="2002" style="--tl-color-accent: #41516C;"}
**Founding**
:::
::: {.event data-label="2007" style="--tl-color-accent: #E24A68;"}
**First Product**
:::
::: {.event data-label="2012" style="--tl-color-accent: #FBCA3E;"}
**Series B**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Company History](gallery/company-history.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-compact style="--tl-color-accent: #2563eb;"}
::: {.event data-label="Install" data-dot="1"}
Add the extension.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Filter" data-dot="2"}
Add to YAML.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Render" data-dot="3"}
Run quarto render.
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Numbered Steps](gallery/numbered-steps.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-brand-dark-prev {
  background: #1a1a2e;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #cccccc;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-compact .ex-brand-dark-prev style="--tl-color-line: #7c3aed; --tl-color-dot: #7c3aed; --tl-color-label: #a78bfa; --tl-color-dot-bg: #1a1a2e; --tl-color-card-bg: #2d2b55;"}
::: {.event data-label="Jan 2024" .tl-card}
**Kickoff**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Apr 2024" .tl-card}
**Alpha Release**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jan 2025" .tl-card}
**v1.0 Launch**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Brand Dark Mode](gallery/brand-dark.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-compact .tl-label-panel .tl-dot-center style="--tl-color-line: #d1d5db; --tl-panel-width: 55px;"}
::: {.event data-label="Aug" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #9251ac;"}
**Birthday**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Aug" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #555ac0;"}
**Lunch**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Aug" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #24b47e;"}
**Exercise**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Panel Cards](gallery/panel-cards.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

::: {.timeline .snake .tl-label-banner .tl-dotted .tl-compact}
::: {.event data-label="Q1" style="--tl-color-label: #6366f1; --tl-color-dot: #6366f1;"}
**Discovery**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q2" style="--tl-color-label: #059669; --tl-color-dot: #059669;"}
**Build**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q3" style="--tl-color-label: #dc2626; --tl-color-dot: #dc2626;"}
**Launch**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Snake Roadmap](gallery/snake-roadmap.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-gc-prev {
  --tl-snake-radius: 0;
  --tl-dot-size: 1.5rem;
  --tl-color-dot: #34435E;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #34435E;
  --tl-color-label: #34435E;
  --tl-dot-icon-color: white;
}
.ex-gc-prev .event {
  color: #34435E;
  border-image: linear-gradient(to right, #743ad5 0%, #d53a9d 100%) 1;
}
.ex-gc-prev .event::before { visibility: hidden; }
</style>

::: {.timeline .snake .tl-compact .ex-gc-prev}
::: {.event data-label="1" data-dot="1"}
Scope and stakeholder alignment.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2" data-dot="2"}
Iterative development sprints.
:::
::: {.event data-label="3" data-dot="3"}
Staged rollout and monitoring.
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Gradient Counter](gallery/gradient-counter.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-daf-prev {
  background: #1e1e2f;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: white;
  --tl-color-line: #27293d;
  --tl-line-width: 3px;
  --tl-color-card-bg: #27293d;
}
.ex-daf-prev.vertical .event.tl-card::before {
  position: static;
  display: inline-block;
  background: var(--tl-color-label);
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.ex-daf-prev .event[data-dot]::after {
  background: var(--tl-color-dot-bg);
  border-color: var(--tl-color-dot);
  color: white;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-compact .ex-daf-prev}
::: {.event data-label="Primary" data-dot="😉" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #1d8cf8; --tl-color-dot: #1d8cf8; --tl-color-dot-bg: #1d8cf8;"}
Short notification text.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Danger" data-dot="😍" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #fd5d93; --tl-color-dot: #fd5d93; --tl-color-dot-bg: #fd5d93;"}
Short notification text.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Success" data-dot="😂" .tl-card style="--tl-color-label: #00bf9a; --tl-color-dot: #00bf9a; --tl-color-dot-bg: #00bf9a;"}
Short notification text.
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Dark Activity Feed](gallery/dark-activity-feed.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-sst-prev {
  --tl-color-line:   #006E51;
  --tl-color-dot:    #006E51;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #ffffff;
  --tl-color-label:  #006E51;
}
.ex-sst-prev .event.tl-card {
  background: #F6D155;
  box-shadow: none;
  border: 2px solid #006E51;
}
.ex-sst-prev .event.tl-card strong { color: #006E51; }
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-pill .tl-label-opposite .tl-dot-center .tl-compact .ex-sst-prev}
::: {.event data-label="Dec" .tl-card}
**Item A**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Oct" .tl-card}
**Item B**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jul" .tl-card}
**Item C**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Alternating Pill](gallery/alternating-pill.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-flag-prev {
  --tl-color-line:   #d5d5d5;
  --tl-color-label:  #00c4f3;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #00c4f3;
}
.timeline.vertical-alt.ex-flag-prev::before {
  background: linear-gradient(
    to bottom,
    transparent 0%, #d5d5d5 8%, #d5d5d5 92%, transparent 100%
  );
}
.ex-flag-prev .event.tl-card > p:first-child {
  position: relative;
}
.ex-flag-prev.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(odd).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: calc(-1rem - 8px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 8px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 8px solid transparent;
  border-left: 8px solid #ffffff;
}
.ex-flag-prev.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(even).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: calc(-1rem - 8px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 8px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 8px solid transparent;
  border-right: 8px solid #ffffff;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-dot-center .tl-diamond .tl-label-badge .tl-compact .ex-flag-prev}
::: {.event data-label="Feb 2015" .tl-card}
**Lorem ipsum.**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Dec 2014" .tl-card}
**Lorem ipsum Anim.**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jul 2014" .tl-card}
**Lorem Occaecat.**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Flag Timeline](gallery/flag-timeline.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-mat-prev {
  --tl-color-line:   #C5CAE9;
  --tl-color-dot:    #3F51B5;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #3F51B5;
  --tl-line-width:   5px;
  --tl-dot-size:     1.875rem;
}
.ex-mat-prev .event::before { display: none; }
.ex-mat-prev .event.tl-card {
  --tl-color-card-bg: #f5f5f5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}
.ex-mat-prev .event.tl-card > p:first-child { position: relative; font-weight: 600; }
.ex-mat-prev.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(odd).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0; height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-left: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}
.ex-mat-prev.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(even).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0; height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-right: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-dot-center .tl-compact .ex-mat-prev}
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Founding**
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Expansion**
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Milestones**
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Material Timeline](gallery/material-timeline.html)
:::
:::

::: gallery-card
::: gallery-preview

<style>
.ex-hl-prev .event.highlight {
  --tl-color-accent: #dc2626;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #dc2626;
}
.ex-hl-prev .event.highlight::after {
  width:  calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  height: calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  left:   calc(-30px - var(--tl-dot-size) * 0.8);
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical .tl-compact .ex-hl-prev}
::: {.event data-label="Jan"}
Beta released.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jun" .highlight}
**Public launch**
:::
::: {.event data-label="Aug"}
First patch.
:::
:::

:::
::: gallery-card-label
[Highlighted Milestone](gallery/highlighted-milestone.html)
:::
:::

:::
